title: What kind of plastics are there in cars?
contentHtml:
有数据显示：2011年，发达国家汽车平均用塑料量达到300kg/辆以上，占整车整备质量的20%;预计到2020年，发达国家汽车平均用塑料量将达到500kg/辆以上。汽车塑料中用量较大的品种有以下几种。
Polypropylene(pp)
Nowadays, in a typical passenger car, PP plastic parts account for more than 60%.
The main varieties of pp auto parts include: bumpers, battery casings, instrument panels, door interior panels, steering wheels, etc.
polyethylene(pe)
Through graft modification and filling and toughening modification of high-density PE and low-density PE resins, a series of modified PE alloy materials with flexibility, weather resistance and coating properties are obtained. PE materials mainly use blow molding method to produce fuel tanks, ventilation pipes, deflectors and various storage tanks.
abs resin
It is a terpolymer of three monomers: acrylonitrile, butadiene and styrene. It can be used to make exterior or interior automotive parts such as instrument casings, refrigeration and heating systems, tool boxes, armrests, radiator grilles, instrument panel skins, trunks, glove box lids, etc.
Polyamide(pa)
Commonly known as nylon, it has high impact strength, friction and wear resistance, heat resistance, chemical resistance, lubricity and dyeability.
PA can be used in harsh environments around automobile engines.
Polyoxymethylene(pom)
It has excellent friction and wear resistance, long-term sliding properties, molding fluidity, beautiful surface, and gloss properties. It is also suitable for insert molding.
汽车底盘衬套等广泛采用聚甲醛型三层复合材料。
contentHtmlZh:
有数据显示：2011年，发达国家汽车平均用塑料量达到300kg/辆以上，占整车整备质量的20%;预计到2020年，发达国家汽车平均用塑料量将达到500kg/辆以上。汽车塑料中用量较大的品种有以下几种。
聚丙烯(pp)
现在典型的乘用车中，pp塑料部件占60多个。
pp汽车零部件主要品种有：保险杠、蓄电池外壳、仪表板、门内饰板、方向盘等。
聚乙烯(pe)
通过对高密度pe和低密度pe树脂的接枝改性和填充增韧改性，得到具有柔韧性、耐候性和涂装性能的系列改性pe合金材料。pe材料主要采用吹塑方法来生产燃油箱、通风管、导流板和各类储罐等。
abs树脂
是丙烯腈、丁二烯和苯乙烯三个单体的三元共聚物，可用于制作汽车外部或内部零件如仪表壳体、制冷和采暖系统、工具箱、扶手、散热器栅板以及仪表板表皮、行李箱、杂物箱盖等。
聚酰胺(pa)
俗称尼龙，具有很高的耐冲击强度、耐摩擦磨耗特性、耐热性、耐化学药品性、润滑性和染色性。
pa可应用在汽车发动机周围的苛刻环境下。
聚甲醛(pom)
具有优良的耐摩擦磨耗特性、长期滑动特性、成型流动性和表面美观、光泽特性，也适用于嵌件模塑。
汽车底盘衬套等广泛采用聚甲醛型三层复合材料。
